corrections.description: File contains wrong content - has 'A Day for Diddle-Daddling' story instead of the 'City' poem by Katherine F. Larsen
corrections.text: The file content does not match the expected poem. It contains the wrong article entirely - 'A Day for Diddle-Daddling' by Alice Morrey Bailey instead of the poem 'City' by Katherine F. Larsen. The entire file content needs to be replaced with the correct poem.
